productDisplayName: Clarks Men Nature Easy Mahogany Leather Brown Casual Shoes
description: An easy-to-slip-into comfortable shoe, the Nature Easy shoe from clarks comes with a  smooth leather upper and has double elasticated goring that offers a snug Fit and helps you slip in and out of it with ease. The Active Air technology in the insole ensures perfect cushioned comfort that makes it a great all-day wear.UpperFull mahogany leather upper in casual loafer style for a soft, natural finish and breathable comfortDual elastic gores on the sides of the tongue for easy wear and removalStitch detailing for durability and styleComplete inner lining in leather for breathable comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight comfortSoft footbed for cushioned, all-day comfortPU insole with Active Air technology for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole for long-lasting wearCircular lugs and grooves strategically placed for absolute grip and tractionGrooves for flexible movement and tractionShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustBrush using a branded leather conditioner to restore shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
